effect: [Counter] DON!! −1 (You may return the specified number of DON!! cards from your field to your DON!! deck.): Up to 1 of your Leader or Character cards gains +1000 power during this turn.
name: Weakness...Is an Unforgivable Sin.
trigger: [Trigger] Add up to 1 DON!! card from your DON!! deck and set it as active.
types: The Seven Warlords of the Sea
